title: Orenium
description: This is the remake from Orenium Legacy. Includes much more content. Enjoy new ores, armor, tools and AIOTs.
body:
Orenium is a remake of the original Orenium Legacy (Orenium Classic/Original) but its still unstable because old code old bugs ig. It adds a lot of things, reforcing every single thing from the old mod, upgrading it to the next level.

Some mod features:

Orenium: The Green ore, the classic, the rarest and the stronger
Topton - The blue ore, the medium tier and the prettier
Eastone - The red ore, the weakest of the ores, but needed to get the ores above.
All these ores have one Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Sword and Hoe...

Good luck!
